ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problem_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem instance */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of the problem (e.g., TSP, VRP) */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset the instance is derived from */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last modified */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the problem instance (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instances_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instances_problem_type FOREIGN KEY ("problem_type") REFERENCES problem_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the problem instance */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used */,
  "solution_value" REAL /* Solution value found by the algorithm */,
  "best_distance" REAL /* Best distance achieved by the algorithm */,
  "gap_percentage" REAL /* Gap percentage between the best-known solution and the algorithm's solution */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the algorithm in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage of the algorithm in bytes */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations the algorithm performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm run (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "creators" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of creators */,
  "references" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of references to publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem type */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Average complexity of problems of this type */,
  "average_solution_time" REAL /* Average time to solve problems of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES algorithm_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
